description: Aave V3 is a multi-pool overcollateralised lending market on Ethereum with four parallel deployments — Main, Lido, Prime/EtherFi, and Horizon RWA — each with its own Pool/PoolConfigurator/ACLManager triplet and a shared Aave Governance V3 root. Borrowers deposit collateral (ATokens) against which they take variable-rate debt (VariableDebtTokens), with valuations driven by Chainlink primary feeds and Aave-deployed CAPO adapters that bound liquid-staking and yield-bearing collateral ratios. The protocol is upgradeable: all pool implementations sit behind InitializableImmutableAdminUpgradeabilityProxies whose immutable admin is the PoolAddressesProvider, itself controlled by the on-chain governance Executor (0x5300A1a1...). Operationally relevant capital reachable from at least one admin is {{totalProtocolCapital}}, and the GHO stablecoin (the protocol's native asset) has a market cap of {{ghoMarketCap}}.

eth:0x22740deBa78d5a0c24C58C740e3715ec29.description: 3 of 5 Gnosis Safe acting as guardian on MainnetSwapSteward 0xb7D402... and PoolExposureSteward 0x22aC12..., which together hold FUNDS_ADMIN on the AaveCollector and execute treasury swaps and Pool deposits/withdrawals on the DAO's behalf. eth:0xdeadD8aB03075b7FBA81864202a2f59EE2.name: Clinic Cleanup Safe (3/5)
eth:0xdeadD8aB03075b7FBA81864202a2f59EE2.description: 3 of 5 Gnosis Safe holding CLEANUP_ROLE on the four ClinicStewards (0x7571F4..., 0xf00E2d..., 0x6A14eB..., 0xE1e62c...). The role can call batchRepayBadDebt and batchLiquidate, which pull AaveCollector treasury funds and route excess back to the Collector. Total per-steward outflow is bounded by each steward's `availableBudget` (USD, currently ~$4,992 / $13,771 / $722,600 / $2,500 across the four ClinicStewards). The DAO Executor sets each budget via setAvailableBudget and can revoke CLEANUP_ROLE at any time.

eth:0x3Cbded22F878aFC8d39dCD744d3Fe62086.description: Hot-wallet operator key holding CLEANUP_ROLE on ClinicSteward 0x7571F4... and ClinicSteward 0xf00E2d..., used to automate batchRepayBadDebt / batchLiquidate / renewAllowance calls against insolvent positions. Per-steward fund impact bounded by `availableBudget` on each ClinicSteward (currently ~$4,992 + ~$13,771); the DAO Executor (DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) can revoke this key at any time.
